description: Manual bill-to-current-law links for the first comparison demo. A production version should infer candidates from bill XML targetActs, then confirm them against data/laws/registry.json.

links.reason: C-273 clauses 2 to 5 amend the Feeds Act to add trusted-jurisdiction rules and provisional/final feed approval or registration.
C-273 clauses 6 to 9 amend the Fertilizers Act to add trusted-jurisdiction rules and provisional/final fertilizer or supplement approval or registration.
C-273 clauses 10 to 13 amend the Seeds Act to add provisional/final variety registration and trusted-jurisdiction reliance.
C-273 clauses 14 to 18 amend the Pest Control Products Act to add trusted-jurisdiction reliance and provisional pest control product registration.
C-273 clause 19 amends subsection 30.06(1) of the Food and Drugs Act to include veterinary drugs in foreign-regulatory-authority deeming orders.
Bill title and clauses amend the Food and Drugs Act to add alcohol warning-label requirements.
Bill title and clauses amend Food and Drugs Act rules for natural health products.
Bill title and clauses amend the Food and Drugs Act for pre-approved special access therapeutic products.
